title: Mandarin in Minutes — Lesson 3: At the Market
status: DRAFT — PRE-GATE. Gate 0 required before firing. Mandarin segments flagged for cousin review.
notes: This episode is the 'payoff' lesson — first full transaction scenario.
Assumes Lessons 1 (tones) and 2 (numbers + duōshao qián) complete.
Cousin review: all Mandarin dialogue lines flagged.

config.voice_suffix: warm clear patient teacher voice, natural pacing, Mandarin demo segments delivered slowly and clearly, bilingual fluency implied

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse, bright classroom backdrop. Zhang Yutong warm welcome back, slight forward lean, slightly more energetic than previous lessons — this is the fun one.
shots.speech_text: Lesson Three — at the market. This is where everything you learned comes together. Tones, numbers, prices. We are going to buy something in Mandarin.

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Nǐ hǎo!' as market greeting is natural. Verify 'Wǒ yào zhè ge' is natural and toned correctly.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong setting a scene — slight gestural mime of entering a stall, greeting, pointing at something. Warm, illustrative, scenario-setting energy.
shots.speech_text: You walk in, you say: Nǐ hǎo! The vendor greets you back. You see something you want. You point and say: Wǒ yào zhè ge — I want this one. Simple as that.
shots.on_screen:
你好！Nǐ hǎo!
我要这个
Wǒ yào zhè ge
I want this one

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify full dialogue sequence naturalness. Vendor response patterns 'X kuài' are correct.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong in dialogue-demonstration mode — slightly acting both sides of a transaction, voice and gesture shifting to indicate the two speakers.
shots.speech_text: Now ask the price. Zhè ge duōshao qián? — How much is this one? The vendor says: Èrshí kuài. Twenty yuan. You already know that number. You are already having a conversation.
shots.on_screen:
这个多少钱？
Zhè ge duōshao qián?
How much is this one?

二十块 · Èrshí kuài

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Tài guì le', 'Piányí diǎn, hǎo ma?' and 'Xíng' are natural market phrases. Tones correct.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong with slight playful expression — this is the fun part (bargaining). Natural amused energy, gestural.
shots.speech_text: Optional bonus: bargaining. Tài guì le — too expensive. Piányí diǎn, hǎo ma? — A little cheaper, okay? If the vendor agrees: Xíng — okay, deal. This is optional but it will delight people.
shots.on_screen:
太贵了！Tài guì le!
Too expensive!

便宜点，好吗？
A little cheaper, okay?

行 Xíng · Deal

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Gěi nǐ' and 'Zhǎo nǐ' constructions are natural. Verify 'bù yòng' is correct for 'no need (for change)'.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong miming handing over money, natural gesture, warm and practical teacher energy.
shots.speech_text: To pay: Gěi nǐ — here you go. The vendor might say Zhǎo nǐ X kuài — here is your change. If you do not need change: Bù yòng zhǎo — no need to make change. Very polite, very natural.
shots.on_screen:
给你 Gěi nǐ
Here you go

找你 Zhǎo nǐ X kuài
Your change

不用找 Bù yòng zhǎo
No change needed

shots.cousin_review_note: Full transaction run-through — verify all phrases flow naturally as a sequence.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong doing the full transaction as a natural flow — energetic, slightly performative run-through, like running lines, warm and clear.
shots.speech_text: Full run. Nǐ hǎo. Wǒ yào zhè ge. Duōshao qián? Tài guì le — piányí diǎn, hǎo ma? Xíng. Gěi nǐ. Xièxiè. You just bought something in Mandarin.
shots.on_screen:
Full transaction →
你好 · 我要这个
多少钱？· 便宜点好吗
行 · 给你 · 谢谢

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong genuine warm sign-off — visibly proud of the student, natural smile.
shots.speech_text: That is Lesson Three. Tones, numbers, prices, a full transaction. Lesson Four — asking questions. You are going to learn how to find out where things are and what they are called. Zàijiàn.
